page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfg8i.32xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 128 dedicated physical cores and 128 vCPUs, utilizing Intel Xeon 6462C processors running at a baseline clock speed of 3.3 GHz. The hardware configuration allocates exactly one thread per core, ensuring dedicated compute resources without hyperthreading overhead. It is equipped with 512.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced allocation of 4.0 GB of RAM per core.

This instance does not include local storage, requiring external block storage solutions for data persistence. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 100 Gbps, facilitating high-throughput data transfers. The absence of integrated GPUs and local storage represents a design tradeoff that optimizes the instance for pure compute and memory-bound workloads. From a cost-efficiency perspective, the dedicated core allocation and high clock speed provide predictable performance for enterprise-scale deployments, avoiding the resource contention typical of shared-core or hyperthreaded environments.

Given its balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, high clock speed, and substantial core count, the ecs.hfg8i.32xlarge is suited for high-performance computing, large-scale web serving, enterprise application hosting, and distributed database nodes that rely on network-attached storage.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfg8i.32xlarge is an x86_64 server instance built on the KVM hypervisor, featuring 128 dedicated physical cores and 128 vCPUs powered by Intel Xeon 6462C processors running at 3.3 GHz. With a single thread per core design, it eliminates hyperthreading overhead to deliver predictable compute performance. The instance is equipped with 512.0 GB of RAM, establishing a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-memory ratio of 4.0 GB per core. It lacks local storage and integrated GPUs, relying instead on network-attached storage and a baseline network bandwidth of 100 Gbps. This configuration is optimized for high-performance computing, enterprise application hosting, and large-scale web serving workloads that require high-frequency dedicated processing power and high-throughput networking without the need for local physical disks.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfg8i.32xlarge is an x86_64 server featuring 128 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs at 3.3 GHz, 512 GB RAM, and 100 Gbps network bandwidth, optimized for high-performance compute workloads.

tagline: A high-frequency dedicated compute instance featuring one hundred twenty-eight physical cores and high-throughput network connectivity for demanding enterprise workloads.
bullet_points: 128 dedicated physical cores and 128 vCPUs with no hyperthreading
Intel Xeon 6462C processor operating at a high 3.3 GHz clock speed
512.0 GB of system memory providing a balanced 1:4 resource ratio
100 Gbps baseline network bandwidth for high-throughput data transfer
Zero local storage and no integrated GPUs, relying on external block storage
Suited for high-performance computing, enterprise hosting, and large web servers
